roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: shows the embedded active Edge build version in central and reseller web panels instead of stale persisted values
adds versioned management URLs and build-aware API cache-busting after every release
forces service-worker update, removes legacy browser caches and uses network-only navigation
adds no-store/no-cache headers and x-bluepanel-version to every panel HTML response
aligns APP_VERSION with BLUEPANEL_CORE_VERSION, BLUEPANEL_EDGE_VERSION and BLUEPANEL_PROCESSOR_VERSION
keeps service deletion, service-name-only lists and Processor repair fixes from previous releases

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; Edge is deployed first and the new management links include the release version
deployment.pasarguard_delete_permission: the connected panel administrator must have users.delete permission

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
an already-open browser tab may need to be closed once; all newly opened versioned management links load the current panel build
